questions.question: Differentiate between IoT Level 2 and Level 3 systems.
expectedPoints: Level 2 is primarily for data logging while Level 3 enables smarter decision-making

questions.question: Compare cloud-centric and edge-centric deployment templates, discussing their advantages, disadvantages, and suitable application scenarios.
expectedPoints: Cloud-centric: centralized processing, scalable storage, higher latency
Edge-centric: local processing, reduced latency, bandwidth efficient
Cost structures: cloud has OpEx, edge has CapEx
